response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription: Transcribed the MC/talk segment between Tsunomaki Watame and Sakura Miko during the 'hololive 5th fes. Ridin' on Dreams' concert. 2. Timing & Pacing: Timed conversational back-and-forths, cheers, and hashtag explanations accurately. 3. End Card: Handled the long silent end card visual event by mirroring the Japanese/English text explicitly present on the screen from 01:49.000 onward.

subtitles.original: 盛り上がっていきますよー！

subtitles.english: You can do even better, right?
You've still got more in you, right?

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、あのね、今回現地に来てくださっているみんなと...
subtitles.english: All right! So, to everyone here at the venue today...

subtitles.original: 配信で見てくださっているみんなも！
subtitles.english: ...and everyone watching the stream as well!

subtitles.original: そう、コメントも見えてますからね！
subtitles.english: Yes, we can see your comments too!

subtitles.original: 配信のみんなは、ハッシュタグ「#ホロライブFesエキスポ24D3」と...
subtitles.english: For everyone streaming, please use the hashtag #hololiveFesEXPO24D3...

subtitles.original: たくさんポストしてくれたら嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: ...and post lots of tweets! We'd love to see them!

subtitles.original: そしてそして！楽しいお知らせがあるんですけど...
subtitles.english: And also, we have an exciting announcement to make...
An exciting announcement? What is it?

subtitles.original: YouTubeとTikTokでご覧の方は、ここまでー！
subtitles.english: For those watching on YouTube and TikTok, this is where the free stream ends!

subtitles.original: はい！でもね、よかったら皆さん、まだまだ楽しいライブは続きますので...
subtitles.english: Yes! But if you'd like, the fun live concert will still be continuing...

subtitles.original: 引き続き見てもらえると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: ...so we'd love it if you keep watching!

subtitles.original: はい、いっぱい声出して応援してね！
subtitles.english: Yes, cheer for us with all your might!

subtitles.original: それではですね、ちょっと次の曲に入りたいと思いますので...
subtitles.english: Now then, we're about to move on to the next song...

subtitles.original: 「せーの」って言ったら、みんなで今回のテーマである「Ridin' on Dreams」と叫んでもらえたら嬉しいです！いいですかー？
subtitles.english: ...so when I say "Ready, set...", we'd love it if everyone shouts out this year's theme, "Ridin' on Dreams"! Are you ready?

subtitles.original: 引き続き楽しんでいってねー！
無料パートは終了いたしました！ご視聴ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: The sneak peek part of the show has ended. Thank you for watching.
